segments.text_en: The system which represented by Inanna is fruitful and confident that is ready for emergence of new traits or the extension
evidence: She praised herself, full of delight at her genitals. When I have gratified the lord...when I have made ...... exuberant. I myself shall speak coaxingly to Enki, in the abzu

segments.text_en: Asking for a service, but the meaning of enquiry is vague
evidence: personally intend to go to the abzu
the sweet oil of the cedar
It shall never escape me that I have been neglected by him who has had sex

segments.text_en: Enki as an orchestrating system knows in advance the needs of Inanna and plans her visit
evidence: he of exceptional knowledge, who knows the divine powers in heaven and earth, who from his own dwelling already knows the intentions of the gods
even before holy Inana had approached within six miles of the abzu knew all about her enterprise
Pour beer for her, in front of the Lions Gate, make her feel as if she is in her girlfriend's house
He welcomed holy Inana at the holy table, at the table of An
Enki and Inana were drinking beer together
enjoying the taste of sweet wine
the two of them started a competition

segments.text_en: The transfer has been initiated by Enki to transmit the divine powers
evidence: I will give them to holy Inana
wickedness, righteousness, the plundering of cities, making lamentations, rejoicing
In the name of my power, in the name of my abzu, I will give them
Holy Inana received
He has given me the craft of the builder
He has given me strife. He has given me triumph

segments.text_en: Enki tries to reach Inanna, only after he figures out that she had left, he put his attention to divine powers. NO demand to return 'me', return is about Inanna itself
evidence: can I still reach her?
holy Inana had gathered up the divine powers and embarked onto the Boat of Heaven. The Boat of Heaven had already left the quay
The lord looked up at the abzu
King Enki turned his attention to Eridug

segments.text_en: The enquiry on localization of the lost divine powers by Enki
evidence: Where are the office of egi-zi priestess
Where are constancy, ......, ......, going down to the underworld, coming up from the underworld
Where are the standard, the quiver, sexual intercourse, kissing, prostitution
My master has given them to his daughter

segments.text_en: Preparing agents for motion within the protocol of exchange
evidence: in the house of Enki should not forget a word
He received ...... the halub tree and his box-tree
He gave ...... to the bird of heaven
He gave ...... to the fish of the subterranean waters

segments.text_en: Algorithm of 7 step requests to return, starting over again, using status enquiries. Notable using guardians of Unug and sending back Inanna to Unug
evidence: Where has the Boat of Heaven reached now?
Go now! The enkum are to take the Boat of Heaven away from her!
His important words cannot be countermanded
Why should his important words not be countermanded?
How could he have altered his promise as far as I am concerned?
Has he duplicitously sent you to me as a messenger?
Now as these words were still in her mouth, he got the enkum to seize hold of the Boat of Heaven
Inana got hold again of the divine powers which had been presented to her, and the Boat of Heaven
A seventh time..

segments.text_en: Transfer of divine powers (discrete units of civilization) has successfully executed. People should show their emotions regarding this transition
evidence: Now there will be rejoicing in our city
It shall pass along the street magnificently
The people shall stand in the street full of awe
The king shall slaughter bulls, shall sacrifice sheep
My people shall utter my praise

segments.text_en: Installation of the divine powers and admiration by Enki
evidence: It reached the maiden's house, and she ...... its place
the purified well, her principal well..
at the Jipar Gate. At the Agrun Chamber
Go now, ...... admiration

segments.text_en: The full list of divine powers that were transmitted
evidence: you have brought with you decision-making
the attractiveness of women
the craft of the scribe..the craft of the builder
you have brought with you being on the move, ... being sedentary
you have brought with you deceitful speech, ... grandiloquent speech
you have brought with you the cultic prostitute

segments.text_en: Name assignment based on features or functions
evidence: she named that place with the name 'Potsherds and scrap metal'
Where the boat came to dock at the quay, she named that place with the name White Quay ... Blue Quay

segments.text_en: Establishing in the abzu domain for Inanna
evidence: Enki spoke to holy Inana
I will establish ...... in my abzu for the woman

segments.text_en: Ambiguous reading of the present situation (taking back divine powers from the intrinsic space)
evidence: Why has this one now entered here? ...... taking the divine powers from me?
May ...... pass their time
May the citizens of your city, Inana
And as for you, Enki -- may ...... your city
and has indeed restored
